movableRule: Only fully completed campaign days stay locked; in-progress and unfinished days reschedule from resumeDate or the first open day.

sourceChecks.useInPlan: Pinterest boards organize Pins from the business profile or Pin creation flow; this workflow uses three distinct Pinterest Pins per campaign day.
YouTube playlists can collect videos or Shorts; playlist creation and daily limits should be rechecked before batching.
Meta Business Suite is the planned scheduling/checking surface for Facebook Page posts and, after connection, Instagram.
TikTok creator playlists are account-gated; if the option is missing, use pinned videos and consistent naming instead.

platformSetups.currentState: 3 posted; 33 ready from the current calendar.
setupChecks: Confirm business/profile access.
Confirm the Day 1 Pin URL and screenshot remain saved.
Create or verify all campaign boards before their first use.
Plan three distinct Pinterest Pins per campaign day.
If any daily Pin cannot be made meaningfully distinct, record a content-creation blocker instead of skipping it.
Keep destination links blank until a real landing/store URL exists.
platformSetups.structureToCreate: Boards for dragon books, screen-free activities, hidden-object challenges, gift ideas, activity books, and fantasy activity books.
platformSetups.dailyCheck: Open all three daily Pinterest tasks, verify each board, asset, title, description, alt text, and link status.
platformSetups.blocker: Missing board or account access blocks that platform task only, not the whole day.

reusePlan.source: Approved square or vertical promo image
reusePlan.reuseSurfaces: Pinterest Pin; Instagram feed/story; Facebook Page post; short-video cover; later newsletter or website slot.
reusePlan.creationNeeded: Platform-specific caption, alt text, hashtags, and a motion-only Seedance image-to-video export from the saved storyboard.
reusePlan.guardrail: Do not call fresh promo art a real cover, real interior page, listing preview, or sample page.

reusePlan.reuseSurfaces: Pinterest challenge Pin; Instagram story; Facebook family post; TikTok/Shorts/Reels pause-and-search clip.
reusePlan.creationNeeded: One short challenge caption plus either a motion-only Seedance image-to-video export or a separate captioned narration short.
reusePlan.guardrail: Do not mark, circle, point to, or reveal the hidden item.

reusePlan.reuseSurfaces: TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and Pinterest Idea Pins where bottom text/narration is desired.
reusePlan.creationNeeded: Scene-by-scene script blocks that intentionally become visible bottom text, plus a clean image/media assignment and 9:16 ratio. This lane may later support AI animation too, but that workflow is not proven yet.
reusePlan.guardrail: Do not use this subtype for clean motion-only videos; the words appear on the video.

reusePlan.reuseSurfaces: Pinned/profile intro; Page banner candidate; first post on each platform; welcome story highlight.
reusePlan.creationNeeded: Account bio copy, alt text, and platform profile checklist.
reusePlan.guardrail: Present Ember as guide/mascot, not as a licensed or borrowed character.

reusePlan.source: Approved interior or final cover asset
reusePlan.reuseSurfaces: Listing images, store page, launch post, and stronger sales copy only after the real asset exists.
reusePlan.creationNeeded: KDP-safe listing image set, real cover mockup, real interior previews, and live URL.
reusePlan.guardrail: Real listing and inside-book claims require real book assets.

creationBacklog.item: Day 2 Pinterest post record and board check
creationBacklog.output: Post record for Screen-free activity idea plus board status.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Create or verify the Screen-Free Activities for Kids board, then post/schedule Day 2.

creationBacklog.output: Confirmed status for Instagram, Facebook Page, YouTube channel, TikTok account, and Meta Business Suite.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Open each platform, verify account/page/channel access, and record blockers.

creationBacklog.output: Proper 2560 x 1440 wide banner with central safe-area composition.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Create/upload after the channel and first Short are stable; do not crop a vertical promo image.

creationBacklog.output: Proper wide Facebook cover image sized for the Page cover surface, with safe-area composition and no tiny unreadable text.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Create/upload after Day 1 Page post and Reel are stable; do not crop a vertical promo image.

creationBacklog.output: Reusable 15-second Seedance storyboard and manual export checklist for approved art with no on-video words.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Create the Day 1 Meet Ember motion-only export from the saved prompt, not from CapCut storyboard text blocks.

creationBacklog.output: Reusable marketing subtype for Shorts/Reels/TikToks where script words intentionally appear across the bottom of the image.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Use the saved Day 1 CapCut discovery as the template for captioned narration clips, separate from clean motion-only exports. AI animation may become part of this lane later, but it still needs a tested checkpoint.

creationBacklog.output: Pinterest boards, Instagram highlights, Facebook pinned/albums, YouTube playlists, TikTok fallback labels.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Create only the structures that match active accounts and current platform options.

creationBacklog.output: Copy snippets by lane: Meet Ember, screen-free, challenge, progress, giftable.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Approve wording style after Day 2 and Day 3 posts.

creationBacklog.output: A real link for Pins/posts once the book or landing page is ready.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Do not add a sales/store link until there is a real destination.

creationBacklog.item: Real cover and listing asset set
creationBacklog.output: Real cover preview, real interior preview images, and store-safe listing graphics.
creationBacklog.ownerAction: Wait for final cover/interior assets; do not use fresh promo art as fake listing material.

dailyOperatingSchedule: Read the next open calendar day and its platform tasks.
Verify the approved asset exists and check any image warning from the post record or QA notes.
Post or schedule the primary Pinterest Pin first because Pinterest is the active discovery platform.
Post or schedule the second and third daily Pinterest Pins with distinct board angles, titles, and descriptions.
If the third Pin cannot be made meaningfully different, record a content-creation blocker instead of treating it as optional.
Post, schedule, or record blockers for Instagram, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.
Reuse the same approved image only with platform-specific copy, alt text, hashtags, and link status.
Create one missing asset or export only when it supports the next open calendar row.
Save a post record with live URL, platform, board/playlist/placement, copy used, warnings, and next action.
Regenerate the calendar only after completion state changes.
weeklyReview: Check whether boards/playlists/highlights still match the active campaign lanes.
Review live URLs, broken links, image warnings, and account blockers.
Add one new reusable asset only if the next calendar week needs it.
Review performance signals lightly: saves, clicks if available, follows, comments, and posts that are worth reusing.
Confirm no customer-facing copy claims sale/listing status before the real link exists.
phaseGates: Prelaunch now: follow, save, sneak peek, progress, and challenge wording only.
Listing-ready later: switch to real cover, real interior previews, real store URL, and stronger product copy.
Launch week: use the same platform structure, but update CTAs to the approved live-link wording.
Post-launch: keep evergreen Pinterest boards alive, recycle best challenge assets, and add real reader-facing assets only after approval.
